channel.title: OS Release Page Watch
channel.description: Android/iOS などのリリース情報ページ変更監視

item.title: 監視対象ページに変更がありました（2件）
item.description:
監視対象ページに変更がありました。

変更ページ数: 2件

iOS_App Store Connect リリースノート

対象URL: https://developer.apple.com/app-store-connect/release-notes/

検出した最終更新日: 検出できませんでした

差分詳細: https://Sarasaraaa.github.io/web-watch-system/diffs/017c7c51ef4ae955.html


変更サマリ:
-View Mainland China compliance information
+View China mainland compliance information
-Create non-renewing subscriptions
-Manage In-App Purchases
+Manage subscriptions
+Create non-renewing subscriptions
-View Mainland China compliance information
+View China mainland compliance information
-Create non-renewing subscriptions
+Create non-renewing subscriptions
+July 15, 2026
+App Store Connect update
+The submission process for In-App Purchases and subscriptions has been updated. You can now submit In-App Purchases, subscriptions, subscription groups, and non-renewing subscriptions directly from the In-App Purchases and Subscriptions sections in App Store Connect using Add for Review.
+Learn more about submitting an In-App Purchase or subscription.
+In-App Purchase

Appleリリース情報

対象URL: https://developer.apple.com/news/releases/

検出した最終更新日: 検出できませんでした

差分詳細: https://Sarasaraaa.github.io/web-watch-system/diffs/aebfbc8f95b89c33.html


変更サマリ:
+App Store Connect API 4.4.1
+July 15, 2026
+Download file
+View release notes
-App Store Connect API 4.4
-June 8, 2026
-Download file
-View release notes
